name: Trinidad Community Farmers Market
notes: The on-file website (trinidadcofarmersmarket.org) is dead (DNS does not resolve). The correct official site is trinidadcofarmersmarket.com (.com, not .org), which matches the on-file Facebook page. 2026 season per official banner is Saturdays June 13 - September 26, 2026, 8:00am-12:00pm at Cimino Park (a separate blurb elsewhere on the same page says 'June 15- Sept 28th', which appears to be stale leftover copy from a prior year; used the clearer, more prominent banner date for Hours/Months). No phone number, Instagram account, ADA accessibility statement, or organic-certification statement found on the site. Products/vendor types are not clearly itemized on the site (only generic 'farm fresh food' language and vendor-application rules referencing 75% grower requirement), so Products was omitted. Address is the market's on-site location (Cimino Park), consistent with existing on-file street address (836 Stonewall Ave is near/adjacent to Cimino Park in Trinidad) - not changed since not clearly a correction, just supplementary.
